bstract":"[单女主]＋[制作动漫]＋[系统]
不是爽文，不是爽文，不是爽文，重要的事情说三遍！！！
穿越到动漫产业贫瘠的平行世界，苏沐阳发现这里竟是未被开垦的蓝海。
曾经因猝死留下遗憾的他，决心带着地球的动漫 IP，在这片土地上打造属于自己的动漫帝国。
女友林晚星是他最坚实的后盾，拿出积蓄支持他租下工作室。
从制作的动画宣传短片开始，苏沐阳凭借独特的创意和精湛的技术，逐渐打破人们对 “动画低龄化” 的固有认知。
当《鬼灭之刃》PV 悄然出现在视频平台后台，幻梦动漫工作室的名字开始进入业内视野，属于他们的动漫传奇，正缓缓拉开序幕。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o9fa6190f40cc559c149e33a7bfd6fcc9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"江椿野望","author_id":"","book_id":"7538776930552646718","book_name":"开局，女友支持我创建动漫工作室","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7538795178799153689","read_count":"435","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"216969"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"99","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,系统,穿越,开局,单女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o9fa6190f40cc559c149e33a7bfd6fcc9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435060&x-signature=ncuFk3e8naCojl5EQullbu1GB5s%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109627470517","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323153100991693CA8488FB11705D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读30分钟后点评"},"sta
